policy_docs.title: Ticket Cancellation Policy
policy_docs.content: Tickets cancelled more than 2 hours before showtime are eligible for 80 percent refund. Tickets cancelled within 2 hours are non-refundable.

policy_docs.title: Refund Processing Policy
policy_docs.content: Refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days to the original payment method.

policy_docs.title: Seat Booking Rules
policy_docs.content: Booked seats cannot be changed after payment confirmation. Users must verify seat selection before confirming payment.

policy_docs.title: Food and Beverage Policy
policy_docs.content: Outside food and beverages are not allowed inside theater premises.

policy_docs.title: Late Entry Policy
policy_docs.content: Late entry after 20 minutes of movie start time may be restricted depending on theater policy.

policy_docs.title: 3D Glasses Policy
policy_docs.content: 3D glasses must be returned after the movie show ends. Damage charges may apply for lost glasses.
